---
title: "Sprengel Museum Exhibitions"
subtitle: "Linked Open Data — Wikidata Records"
description: "Exhibitions at the Sprengel Museum Hannover drawn from Wikidata, enriched with start and end dates."
date: today
execute:
  echo: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: load-data
import csv
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML

XML_PATH = Path("ausstellungen/exhibitions.xml")
tree = ET.parse(XML_PATH)
root = tree.getroot()

def text(el, tag):
    child = el.find(tag)
    return child.text.strip() if child is not None and child.text else ""

exhibitions = []
for ex in root.findall("exhibition"):
    exhibitions.append({k: text(ex, k) for k in [
        "qid", "wikidata_url", "museum_url", "slug",
        "title", "start_date", "end_date",
        "location", "curator", "organizer",
        "country", "website", "image", "description",
    ]})

# Sort by start date
exhibitions.sort(key=lambda x: x["start_date"])
print(f"Loaded {len(exhibitions)} exhibitions")
```

```{python}
#| label: build-cards
#| output: asis

def date_range(ex):
    if ex["start_date"] and ex["end_date"]:
        return f"{ex['start_date']} – {ex['end_date']}"
    if ex["start_date"]:
        return f"from {ex['start_date']}"
    return "Date unknown"

def badge(label, colour="secondary"):
    return f'<span class="badge bg-{colour} me-1">{label}</span>'

cards_html = '<div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 row-cols-lg-3 g-4 mt-2">\n'

for ex in exhibitions:
    title   = ex["title"] or ex["slug"]
    wd_url  = ex["wikidata_url"]
    mus_url = ex["museum_url"] or ex["website"]
    curator = ex["curator"]
    loc     = ex["location"]
    desc    = ex["description"]
    img     = ex["image"]

    img_html = (
        f'<img src="{img}" class="card-img-top" alt="{title}" '
        f'style="max-height:180px;object-fit:cover;" loading="lazy">'
        if img else
        '<div class="card-img-top bg-secondary d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center" '
        'style="height:120px;"><span class="text-white text-muted">No image</span></div>'
    )

    curator_badge = badge(curator, "info") if curator else ""
    loc_badge     = badge(loc, "light text-dark") if loc else ""

    links = ""
    if wd_url:
        links += f'<a href="{wd_url}" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary me-1" target="_blank">Wikidata</a>'
    if mus_url:
        links += f'<a href="{mus_url}" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">Museum</a>'

    cards_html += f"""  <div class="col">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      {img_html}
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">{title}</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted small mb-1">{date_range(ex)}</p>
        <p class="card-text small mb-2">{curator_badge}{loc_badge}</p>
        <p class="card-text small">{desc[:200] + '…' if len(desc) > 200 else desc}</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer bg-transparent border-0">{links}</div>
    </div>
  </div>
"""

cards_html += "</div>\n"
print(cards_html)
```

---

## Full Exhibition Table

```{python}
#| label: table
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(exhibitions)[[
    "title", "start_date", "end_date", "location", "curator", "qid"
]]
df.columns = ["Title", "Start", "End", "Location", "Curator", "QID"]
df["QID"] = df["QID"].apply(
    lambda q: f'<a href="https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/{q}" target="_blank">{q}</a>' if q else ""
)
df.index = range(1, len(df) + 1)
HTML(df.to_html(escape=False, classes="table table-sm table-hover", border=0))
```
